title: AwardsWatch Final 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Actor
text: According to Erik Anderson's March 10, 2026 predictions for the 98th Academy Awards (March 15, 2026): Winner Prediction: Michael B. Jordan in Sinners (Warner Bros). Awards won: BAFTA, CCA, GG, SAG. Full Rankings: 2) Timothée Chalamet in Marty Supreme (A24) - the tide shifted at BAFTA, where he lost unexpectedly. 3) Leonardo DiCaprio in One Battle After Another (Warner Bros) - Described as having been a non-presence despite nominations. 4) Wagner Moura in The Secret Agent (NEON). 5) Ethan Hawke in Blue Moon (Sony Pictures Classics). Key Analysis: Anderson notes Jordan's advantage stems from being in a top Best Picture contender while holding an industry award, though he acknowledges the historical pattern that Best Actor winners rarely align with Best Picture winners in recent years.
